title: HDC automated UniFi inventory layout
description: UniFi Network query writes systems as unifi-{device|client|pending}-* under inventory/automated/systems/; networks and policies use target-agnostic name slugs (net-<slug>, pf-<slug>, fw-<slug>) with per-target snapshots in sources[<target>]. Plugin metadata lives in inventory/manual/targets/unifi-network.json.
